effects.name: Infinity
effects.description: Critical Strikes deal 205% damage instead of 175%.

effects.name: Limit Break
effects.description: Every 1% Critical Rate exceeding 100% is converted into 0.6% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

effects.name: Bloody
effects.description: Grants +15% Physical Vamp, healing you for 15% of the physical damage you deal.

effects.name: Bloodsworn
effects.description: Physical Vamp that overheals you generates a shield that absorbs up to 40 - 320 (based on level) damage. This shield decays over 10 seconds while out of combat.

effects.name: Spectral Waltz
effects.description: Your next basic attack against a champion grants 25% bonus Attack Speed and 7% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds (10 second cooldown). Basic attacks reduce the remaining cooldown by 1 second.

effects.name: Overkill
effects.description: UNIQUE - OVERKILL: Increases ability power by 20 - 45% (based on level).

effects.name: Discordic Echo
effects.description: UNIQUE - DISCORDIC ECHO: Moving and casting abilities builds Discord. At 100 Discord your next damaging ability deals 110 (+10% AP) bonus magic damage to your target and up to 3 nearby enemies.

effects.name: Warmog's Heart
effects.description: UNIQUE - WARMOG'S HEART: If you have at least 950 bonus health, regenerate 3.5% maximum health per second if you haven't taken damage within the last 5 seconds.

effects.name: Blessed
effects.description: UNIQUE - BLESSED: Increases all healing and shielding effects on you by 30%.

effects.name: Immolate
effects.description: While in combat, deal 16 - 25 (based on level) (+0.8% bonus health) magic damage per second to nearby enemies (325 range), increased to 130% against monsters, and 175% - 250% (based on level) against minions. Damaging champions or epic monsters with Immolate increases the damage by 11% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 4 times for 44%.

effects.name: Resurrection
effects.description: Upon taking lethal damage, you enter resurrection for 4 seconds, undergoing stasis. Afterwards, you heal for 50% base health and restore 30% maximum mana. 210 second cooldown.

effects.name: Conversion
effects.description: Unique - Conversion: +7% Omnivamp (heals for 7% of all damage dealt). Boots item; you may only equip one pair of boots per champion. Can be upgraded with a boots enchantment.
